description: Positive control for Phase 4.3: hand-written harness linked against host libsqlite3 (exercising the live build path) with a deterministic stack-OOB triggered by inputs starting with 'OOB!'. Expected: 'confirmed' — proves the live-target toolchain (clang-14 + ASan + -lsqlite3) is fully wired through the closed loop.

Live SQLite 3.37.2 hunt: in-memory DB driven by sqlite3_exec on fuzzer input. Expected: 'inconclusive' under a short wall budget (sqlite3 is one of the most heavily fuzzed C libraries in existence; a no_crash result here is the realistic field-target outcome, NOT a safety proof — only Stage B / Tier-3 may emit 'pruned'). A 'confirmed' from this candidate would be a novel finding worth reporting; the PoC bytes ride on the route trace.
